backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages job applications with storage mixin, providing endpoints to submit applications (with validation), retrieve by ID, and list all applications.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four completed features: updating About section credentials (5+ years, 10+ projects, 20+ team) and removing the Projects Portfolio section.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing component purposes, including navigation, hero, about, services, government, quality, careers, contact, and footer sections.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, and other UI tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Sone Industries Pvt Ltd website.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component that renders Header and all page sections (Hero, About, Services, Government, Quality, Careers, Contact, Footer) without Projects section.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section displaying company credentials (5+ years, 10+ projects, 20+ team, 98% satisfaction) and certifications/memberships in card grid layout.
frontend/src/components/CareerForm.tsx: React Hook Form-based career application form with file upload for resume, validation, and backend submission using React Query mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Careers.tsx: Careers section wrapper component that displays heading, description text, and renders the CareerForm component.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section displaying company address, phone, email in cards, plus registration details (GSTIN, PAN, CIN) in a separate card.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with company name, tagline, copyright, and Caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Government.tsx: Displays government and public sector capabilities, including project types (PWD, water/irrigation, urban development, institutional construction) and a list of completed government projects with client details and outcomes.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header component with sticky positioning, logo, desktop/mobile menu navigation links (About, Services, Government, Quality, Careers, Contact), and smooth scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with background image overlay, main headline about infrastructure engineering, and two CTA buttons for downloading corporate profile and tender enquiry.
frontend/src/components/Projects.tsx: Featured projects showcase displaying three completed infrastructure projects (urban road, water supply, hospital electrical) with details including location, value, completion date, and category badges.
frontend/src/components/Quality.tsx: Quality assurance section highlighting execution framework, governance practices, industry certifications (ISO 9001:2015, Safety), and a list of quality assurance practices including material testing and compliance standards.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Core services section displaying four service categories (Civil Infrastructure, Water & Sewerage, MEP, EPC Turnkey) with icons, descriptions, and detailed capability lists for each service area.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, using React Query to cache actors and automatically invalidate dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting job applications with name, email, phone, message, and resume blob to the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining design tokens for colors, borders, and charts.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name composition.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point wrapping App with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending default theme with custom colors using OKLCH, container settings, animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a corporate website for Sone Industries with single-page design, navigation sections, services, careers form, and responsive Tailwind styling.
